nodes.name: Insert Error Log Row
nodes.notes: If logging storage fails, we still alert. Run PK-00 Setup Data Tables before using this workflow.

nodes.name: Alert Settings
nodes.notes: EDIT ME: open this node and type your Slack channel ID and alert email addresses. No environment variables needed.

parameters.content:
## 🛠 Setup (2 minutes)
1. Open the **Alert Settings** node and type your Slack channel ID and alert emails.
2. Click the **Send Slack Alert** node and connect your Slack account.
3. Click **Email Fallback Alert** and connect any email (SMTP) account.
4. Publish this workflow.
5. In every workflow you want protected: Settings → Error Workflow → pick this one.

That's it — failures now get logged and alerted automatically.

parameters.subject: =[n8n ALERT] Workflow failed: {{ $json.workflow_name }}
